title: Dual Sided 12pc Wax Clay Carving Pick Spatula Tool Set with Case Arts and Crafts
description:
Does your next craft project need that extra something to make it extra special? This dual-sided stainless steel carving set has 12 options of picks or spatulas that will give your project what it needs to make it great! This set includes a carrying case to keep the set organized and secure. With the options of tools you can use, you will be able to sculpt, carve, create, and more! This also makes the perfect gift for that special crafting enthusiast or die hard hobbyists in your life.
